历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 468 → 560 → 608 → 853 → 550, showing significant fluctuations: from 2021 to 2024, rankings continuously declined (cumulative decline of 385 places), while in 2025, rankings sharply improved by 303 places back to the 550 level; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 550. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 30 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 31 in 2023, 29 in 2024, and reduced to 22 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 22, unchanged from 2025, with no further expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 17th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, consistently in the Top 20 in recent years, placing it at the national top tier; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation is somewhat negative, mainly involving incidents related to teacher ethics and campus safety discussions, which may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranks 44th (relatively hot), indicating still high attention as a top institution; no obvious signs of major ranking drops in historical admission anomalies; Physics Category enrollment majors include Computer Science and Technology (A), Statistics (A+), Applied Economics (A+), Law (A+), etc., with strong academic strength, highly attractive to top science students. Computer science, artificial intelligence, statistics, and other Physics Category majors at Renmin University are highly recommended with high social heat, electronics/information and communication are highly recommended, law is moderately hot; the total number of candidates in the province for the 2026 college entrance examination is approximately 609,800, slightly increased from 2025 (approximately 606,754 for both History and Physics Categories), leading to a slight intensification of overall competition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, not a provincial university; its Physics Category enrollment in Hebei Province accounts for about 2%-3%, making it a cross-provincial enrollment with no significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the low baseline after the sharp ranking improvement in 2025, the 2026 plan unchanged from 2025, a slight increase in the total number of provincial candidates leading to slightly intensified competition, a somewhat negative reputation that may mildly suppress application enthusiasm, but popular majors like computer science/AI continue to attract high-scoring candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 550, the predicted minimum ranking is expected to increase slightly (competition slightly intensifies); predicted minimum ranking approximately 565, with a range of 497–633.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (497–633), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 500), you can focus on applying for Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 630), you should prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 93 → 97 → 96 → 107 → 147, showing a clear backward trend in recent two years. In 2024, it moved back 11 places compared to 2023, and in 2025, it moved back significantly by 40 places compared to 2024, with a cumulative backward movement of about 51 places in the last three years. The baseline for 2025 is about 147th place. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 33 in 2021, 32 in 2022, 29 in 2023, 29 in 2024, and increased to 40 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 42, an increase of 2 more compared to 2025, with two consecutive years of expansion, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 17th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the top 20 in recent years, belonging to the national top tier. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents and campus safety discussions, which may slightly suppress some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 44th (relatively hot), and as a top liberal arts institution, it still attracts high attention. No obvious signal of a gap in historical admission records for Renmin University. It has 15 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Law, Applied Economics, Theoretical Economics, Sociology, Statistics, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, and Marxist Theory, with top-tier humanities and social sciences strength, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Renmin University's flagship majors such as Law, Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics is divided and cautious, while Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. The total number of candidates in the province for the 2026 college entrance examination is about 609,800, a slight increase compared to 2025 (History Category + Physics Category about 606,754), leading to a slight intensification of overall competition. Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, not a provincial university. Its enrollment proportion in Hebei Province for History Category is about 2%-3%, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical trend of backward rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+2 people) slightly easing competition, the slight increase in the total number of candidates in the province slightly intensifying competition, and the negative reputation possibly slightly suppressing application enthusiasm, based on the 2025 baseline of 147th place, the predicted ranking number is expected to increase slightly (easier to enter). The predicted minimum ranking is about 156th place, with a range of 106–206.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (106–206), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, Tier 1 flagship majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 100), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Law and Finance. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 200), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
